name: Scenario Engine
inputNotes: Use current chapters and open issues.

name: Character Engine
promptOverride: Weight protagonist and antagonist motivations first.

name: Author Engine
summary: Forecast twists, reversals, and pacing spikes.
promptOverride: Prioritize escalation and reversals every 2-3 chapters.

name: Reader Engine
summary: Infer what readers may want next.
promptOverride: Bias toward beta reader aggregate preferences.

name: Logic Engine
summary: Forecast from established story logic and constraints.

name: Reviewer Logic
summary: Score logical consistency and point out weak causal links.
